svg.title: ECDF — No Bin-Width Required — ECDFSeries
svg.desc: Ecdf chart titled "ECDF — No Bin-Width Required — ECDFSeries". X axis: Response Time (ms). Y axis: Cumulative Proportion. Series "Control (n=400)": 400 data points. Ranges from 0.0025 (at 12.575982959885863) to 1 (at 89.40359124477027). Series "Treatment (n=400)": 400 data points. Ranges from 0.0025 (at 33.82330947698575) to 1 (at 94.93165761731143).
